headline: Assessing 3M (MMM) Valuation After Q1 2026 Earnings Beat And Guidance Update
summary: 3M (MMM) is back in focus after its Q1 2026 report showed sales of US$6.03b and adjusted earnings of US$2.14 per share, both above analyst expectations, with management reiterating full year adjusted EPS guidance. See our latest analysis for 3M. Despite the earnings beat, 3M's share price has been under pressure recently, with a 1-day share price return of a 1.94% decline and a 7-day share price return of a 2.67% decline. At the same time, its 1-year total shareholder return stands at 10.91%...
